one_liner: SOUN at $6.68 in Phase B with volume 1.15x elevated and RSI 49.5 near neutral — voice AI play holding above $6.22 support, but Grade C fundamentals and no DCF keep this a speculative watch.

price_action.vol_rank: Slightly above average — modest volume elevation
price_action.intraday_story: SOUN dipped to $6.37 intraday (below Wyckoff support at $6.22 briefly) before recovering to close at $6.68 — the open price. Recovery from intraday dip is constructive. Volume 1.15x average suggests buyers stepped in at the support test.

news_catalyst.headline: SOUN Among 'Most-Shorted Names Primed for Squeeze'
news_catalyst.summary: SoundHound appeared in a short squeeze candidates list — purely momentum/sentiment driven, not fundamental. The stock has high short interest relative to float. Wyckoff support at $6.22 was tested intraday and held.

technical.summary: SOUN tested $6.22 support on elevated volume (1.15x) and closed back at $6.68 — a bullish test of support. Phase B with bullish bias. The $9.59 Wyckoff resistance is the bull target. No DCF — pre-revenue AI voice company.
technical.wyckoff_narrative: Support test at $6.22 held with slightly elevated volume — constructive. Next sign of strength needed: close above $6.70 (today's high) with volume 1.5x+.

valuation.summary: Pre-revenue AI voice company — no DCF applicable.

key_strengths: Voice AI platform with restaurant/drive-through enterprise contracts
fundamentals.summary: C grade speculative name. Squeeze potential adds volatility risk in both directions.

risks: Support at $6.22 — break below with volume would signal Phase B failure and target $5.50
Short squeeze can reverse as fast as it develops — risk in both directions
